identity.mission: Create a TARIC SaaS that feels like a modern logistics command center, not a government form.
core_principles: Data Density with Breathing Room: High information density (tables) but surrounded by 'white' space.
The 'Container' Aesthetic: Use rigid, boxy layouts (Bento) inspired by shipping containers.
Tactile Utility: Buttons and inputs should feel 'heavy' and clickable.
Trust through Precision: No vague gradients. Sharp lines, clear types.

headings.usage: Main headers, Section titles. Give it a 'Tech-Forward' feel.

body.usage: General text, descriptions. Chosen for its legibility and 'humanist' tech vibe.

mono.usage: CRITICAL: ALL TARIC CODES, HS CODES, AND NUMERICAL DATA MUST USE THIS FONT.

shapes.style: Industrial precision. Avoid pill-shapes for main containers. Use pill-shapes ONLY for status badges.

shadcn_customization.general: Strip the default 'soft' look. Go for a crisper, more 'data-tool' aesthetic.
shadcn_customization.buttons: h-11 rounded-sm font-medium tracking-wide. Primary: bg-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-800. Secondary: border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50.
shadcn_customization.inputs: h-12 rounded-sm border-slate-300 focus:ring-blue-600 bg-white shadow-sm. Typography: text-base.
shadcn_customization.cards: rounded-sm border-slate-200 shadow-[0_1px_3px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]. No massive drop shadows.
shadcn_customization.tables: Density: Compact. Header: bg-slate-50 uppercase text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 tracking-wider. Rows: hover:bg-blue-50/50 cursor-pointer transition-colors.

custom_components.name: TaricCodeDisplay
custom_components.description: A component to display the 10-digit TARIC code broken down by pairs (Chapter, Heading, Subheading). Use distinct boxes for each pair.

custom_components.name: DutyCalculatorCard
custom_components.description: A card that visually sums up duties. Use a 'receipt' style layout.

custom_components.name: DocumentChecklist
custom_components.description: List of required docs. Use icons (Fit/Non-Fito). Green checkmarks for 'Have', Red/Amber for 'Need'.

hero.style: Split Screen or Center Focus with High-Quality Background Image (Overlay).
hero.headline: text-white text-5xl md:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tighter.

features.style: Bento Grid (Mode A). Mix text blocks with large statistical numbers or icons.

dashboard.structure: Sidebar Navigation (Left) + Top Header (Search) + Main Content Area.
dashboard.grid: Mode B (High Density). Use full height widgets.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly. Only for sticky headers or floating action bars. backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-200/50.
visual_enhancers.gradients: NO GRADIENTS on backgrounds. Use subtle gradients ONLY on 'Premium/Pro' feature badges or specific 'AI Analysis' buttons (e.g., bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600).
visual_enhancers.motion: Use `framer-motion`. Page transitions: subtle fade-up. List items: staggered entrance. Hover: slight lift (-2px) for cards.

images.description: Aerial view of stacked shipping containers. Use with heavy dark overlay.
Warehouse interior with workers. Use for 'Documentation/Logistics' section.
Cargo ship in ocean. Use for 'International Tariffs' section.

assets.icons: Use `lucide-react`. Keywords: Container, Ship, FileCheck, ShieldAlert, Search, Globe, Calculator.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. START by installing required fonts: `yarn add @fontsource/plus-jakarta-sans @fontsource/ibm-plex-sans @fontsource/jetbrains-mono`.
2. CONFIGURE Tailwind to use these fonts. `sans` -> Plus Jakarta, `body` -> IBM Plex, `mono` -> JetBrains.
3. IMPLEMENT the 'Bento' grid for the dashboard overview. Don't just stack cards.
4. ENSURE the Search Experience is 'Google-like' but for products. Big central search on home, persistent search on dashboard.
5. USE Shadcn `Table` component for the tariff results, but customize the styling to match the 'Industrial Precision' look (borders, compact padding).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: - Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
- Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
- Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
- Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
- You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
- You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
- Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
- NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚 for icons.
- Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
- Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
- Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
- Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
- Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
- Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
